error.no_credentials: Enter a Claude OAuth token or an Anthropic API key.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to run Claude. Check the logs for details.
error.oauth_failed: Login failed. Make sure you pasted the full code, then try the link again.

user.title: Claude
user.description: Run Home Assistant conversation agents and AI Tasks on your Claude subscription.

menu_options.manual: Enter a token or API key manually
Enter a token or API key manually
Enter a token or API key manually

oauth.title: Log in with Claude
oauth.description:
1. Open this link and approve access: [Log in with Claude]({url})
2. Copy the code shown after approving.
3. Paste it below.

data_description.code: The `code#state` value shown by Claude after you approve access.

data_description.oauth_token: Token from `claude setup-token`. Uses your Claude subscription.
data_description.api_key: Anthropic API key, used only when no OAuth token is set (pay-per-token billing).

manual.description: Provide a Claude OAuth token (from `claude setup-token`) or an Anthropic API key.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add things while the configuration is disabled.

error.thinking_budget_too_large: Thinking budget must be less than the maximum tokens.

data.max_tokens: Maximum tokens to return in response

data_description.chat_model: The model to serve the responses. 'Account default' uses your Claude default model.
data_description.code_execution: Allow the model to run shell commands and read/write files in a scratch workspace inside the Home Assistant process.
data_description.max_tokens: Limit the number of response tokens per model turn.
data_description.thinking_budget: The number of tokens the model can use to think about the response. Set to 1024 or greater to enable extended thinking; 0 lets the model decide.
data_description.thinking_effort: Control how much effort Claude uses when responding, trading off between response thoroughness and token efficiency. 'Default' lets Claude decide.
data_description.user_location: Localize search results based on home location
data_description.web_fetch: Allow Claude to retrieve full content from web pages to augment its context with live web content.
data_description.web_search: Give Claude direct access to real-time web content, allowing it to answer questions with up-to-date information beyond its knowledge cutoff.
data_description.show_activity: Stream a live status line into the chat for each tool call and subagent spawn, so you can see what the agent is doing during long turns.
data_description.run_timeout: Abort a chat run that neither finishes nor errors within this many seconds (0 disables). Raise it for long multi-step or multi-subagent tasks; keep it low for voice.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add things while the configuration is disabled.

error.thinking_budget_too_large: Thinking budget must be less than the maximum tokens.

data_description.llm_hass_api: Allow the LLM to control Home Assistant.
data_description.name: The name of this configuration
data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template.

data.max_tokens: Maximum tokens to return in response

data_description.thinking_budget: The number of tokens the model can use to think about the response. Set to 1024 or greater to enable extended thinking; 0 lets the model decide.
data_description.thinking_effort: Control how much effort Claude uses when responding, trading off between response thoroughness and token efficiency. 'Default' lets Claude decide.

not_authenticated.message: Claude has no valid credentials. Re-authenticate the integration with an OAuth token or API key.

response_not_found.message: Last content in chat log is not an AssistantContent.

system_message_not_found.message: First message must be a system message.

user_message_not_found.message: Last message must be a user message.

oauth_token_expiring.title: Claude login expires soon
oauth_token_expiring.description:
The Claude login used by {name} expires on {expires_at} ({days} days from now). When it does, conversations and AI tasks will stop working with an authentication error.

Go to Settings > Devices & services > Claude, select Reconfigure, and log in with Claude again.

oauth_token_expired.title: Claude login expired
oauth_token_expired.description:
The Claude login used by {name} expired on {expires_at}, so conversations and AI tasks are failing with an authentication error.

Go to Settings > Devices & services > Claude, select Reconfigure, and log in with Claude again.
